positive: A whimsical and energetic scene featuring a stylized forest creature mix, combining elements of a fox, a deer, and glowing bioluminescent fungi, curled up with a vintage hot air balloon motif partially visible in the corner. The composition must be centrally focused and highly symmetrical, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong linework. Use a limited, harmonious color palette of deep forest greens, earthy terracotta, warm burnt orange, and glowing cyan for the bioluminescence. Style: Art Nouveau meets Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print, rendered with flat, poster-print colors and thick outlines. Perfect for direct apparel screen printing, ensuring high contrast and minimal gradient transitions. The overall mood should be mystical and joyful. Overhead studio lighting, studio backdrop.
negative: blurry, noisy, low detail, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, noise, gradients, photorealistic, low contrast
